Source Domain: --- FINANCIAL CASCADE: how money connects to everything ---

Bridge Elements: RFIâ†’CE (origin_type = 'Rfi::Header'), Drawingâ†’Submittal (spec_section)
Notes: RFIs generate 307K origin-linked CEs. Strongest document-to-financial bridge.

Bridge Elements: Observationâ†’CE (origin_type = 'Observations::Item'), Punch Itemâ†’Rework Cost (inferred chain), NCRâ†’Backcharge
Notes: Observations are leading indicators (28-day lead on CEs). 20,238 observation-originated CEs across 727 cos.

Bridge Elements: Cost Codeâ†’MasterFormat Divisionâ†’Building System, WBS Codeâ†’Element-level cost, CE/CCO Line Itemsâ†’wbs_code_id
Notes: MasterFormat cost codes are the primary financial-to-physical mapping. wbs_code_id on line items enables element-level cost attribution.

Bridge Elements: Commitmentâ†’Vendor (vendor_id), CCOâ†’Vendor (via commitment)
Notes: Every commitment links to a vendor. Vendor performance measured via CO rate, invoice timing, and quality records.

Bridge Elements: Schedule Activityâ†’Cost Loading, CE schedule_impact flag, Delayâ†’Cost Impact
Notes: Schedule delays trigger cost changes. Cost-loaded schedules enable earned value. Cash flow tied to billing cycle.

Bridge Elements: Cost Codeâ†’MasterFormat Division, Budget Codeâ†’UniFormat Category, change_reasonâ†’structured enum
Notes: MasterFormat is the Rosetta Stone for cross-company cost normalization. change_reason is the primary CE/CCO categorization.

Bridge Elements: Daily Log Delayâ†’Cost Impact, T&M Ticketâ†’Direct Cost, Manpowerâ†’Labor Cost
Notes: Daily log delays trigger cost events. T&M entries become direct costs. Manpower hours feed cost tracking.

Bridge Elements: Commitment (Subcontract/PO)â†’Budget Line Items, Bidâ†’Awardâ†’Commitment
Notes: Financial Instruments tracks money flow; Contracts & Procurement tracks commercial process. Subcontract/PO instruments shared.

Bridge Elements: Billing cycleâ†’Phase milestones, Retainageâ†’Substantial Completion, Contingencyâ†’Construction phase
Notes: Contingency burned during construction. Retainage released at substantial/final completion. Billing follows phase milestones.

Bridge Elements: Contingencyâ†’Risk Reserve, CE change_reasonâ†’Risk Category, CO Rateâ†’Risk Indicator
Notes: Contingency burn rate is a leading financial risk indicator. Change order rate decomposed by change_reason reveals risk sources.

Bridge Elements: WBS Codeâ†’Location segment, Budget Line Itemâ†’Location allocation
Notes: WBS codes can segment cost by location. Not all companies use location-based WBS.

Bridge Elements: Cost Engineerâ†’Budget, PMâ†’Change Orders, Accountantâ†’Invoices
Notes: Financial workflows require specific role approvals. Cost engineer, PM, and accounting roles drive financial process.

Source Domain: --- FIELD-TO-FINANCIAL BRIDGE: how field data connects to money ---

Notes: Photos attached to observations/punch items. Coordination issues link to RFIs (4,967 linked). Inspections reference spec sections.

Bridge Elements: Observation.nameâ†’18 Issue Categoriesâ†’Building System, Punch Item.nameâ†’18 Categories, Inspection Itemâ†’System

Bridge Elements: Observationâ†’vendor_id (80%), Punch Itemâ†’vendor_id, Inspectionâ†’responsible_contractor_id (48%)

Bridge Elements: Daily Log Safety Violationâ†’Safety Obs (conceptual), Accident Logâ†’Incident, Daily Log Inspectionâ†’Inspection

Bridge Elements: Observationâ†’Construction phase, Punch Itemâ†’Closeout, Inspectionâ†’Pre-cover/Pre-pour gates

Bridge Elements: Safety Observationâ†’Safety Risk, Quality Deficiencyâ†’Rework Risk, Hazard Recurrenceâ†’Systemic Risk
Notes: Quality/safety records are primary risk signals. Validated in insights #1, #4, #11.

Bridge Elements: Coordination Issueâ†’BIM Clash, Observationâ†’Model Element (conceptual)

Bridge Elements: Deficiency Noticeâ†’Contract cure provisions, NCRâ†’Specification deviation, Backchargeâ†’Subcontract
Notes: Deficiency notices invoke contractual cure provisions. NCRs trace to spec sections. Backcharges deduct from subcontracts.

Source Domain: --- DOCUMENT WEB: how information connects to everything ---
